description: Product Description Product description Application The organza bag is translucent, ventilated and lightweight. It is ideal for filling dry petals and for wrapping small gifts. You can give free rein to your creativity. Material: High quality organza Size: Approx. 7*9cm Quantity: 100 pieces (Manual counting, sometimes with errors) The organza bag can be used to fill lavender petals, rose petals or other dried flowers to protect your clothes from insects and preserve the fragrance of the wardrobe. During weddings, parties and festivals, organza bags can be used to wrap sweets, chocolates, biscuits or other small gifts.
